statement: Operational monitoring should temporarily use getProcessHealth + direct tables + Axiom traces because Lab summaries are presently read-limit unstable.
rationale: Repeated read-limit failures in lab summary/list endpoints and getStuckWork contrast with stable getProcessHealth and Axiom query results.
keyAssumptions: Current read-limit behavior persists during active experiment load
validationCriteria: Alternative source set continues returning consistent health state over repeated checks
critiquePoints: If load drops, lab endpoints may recover and become usable again
questions: Should we add explicit low-cost ops queries to replace expensive summary paths?
